title: Welcome Master
overview: Taro's mother has passed. He travel's to his grandfather's Tokyo mansion. There he is greeted by dozens of maids and short film. In the film, his grandfather explains going stay in paradise and leave his mansion and maids to Taro.

title: A Pleasant School Life
overview: Taro's first day at his new school. He arrives in a helicopter and is miraculously successful in every thing he does.

title: Inventive Girl and the Unusual Midsummer Event
overview:
Taro stays home from school and explores his new home.

He finds courage and happiness while losing his shirt.

title: A Rival (One-Sided) Appears
overview:
An ill-tempered member of a rival family introduces herself.

She talks down to Taro and gets a double-helping of karma.

title: A New Face Returns
overview: The head of the security returns. Taro quickly learns he's not the true Master of the estate.

title: A Pleasant School Life: Mission 2
overview: Taro is getting suspicious of his luck in school.

title: A Promise at a Summer Resort
Hanukyo's Family Brain
overview: Within the Hanaukyo household, the "brain" is a supercomputer named MEMOL, which runs the mansion's entire system. The computer security department is overseen by Cynthia/Grace, making her the "brains" of the operation.

title: A Day Without Maids
overview: Taro finds himself alone in the mansion, forcing him to take care of himself. This provided him with an important opportunity for personal reflection and growth, away from the constant, overwhelming service of the maids.

title: Going the Extra Mile
overview: The maids' overenthusiastic attempts to serve and pamper their new master often lead to chaotic, comical, or embarrassing situations for the shy Taro.

title: A Sudden Proposal
overview: Taro is developing feelings for Mariel, the head maid, when he receives a shocking revelation.He is informed that he has an arranged marriage to Ryuka Jihioh, a member of a rival family. Ryuka is not pleased with the arrangement and is particularly annoyed to find that the new head of the rival family is a "whiny midget". To settle who is the better match for Taro, Ryuka challenges Mariel to a series of competitions.

title: Happy Birthday
overview: Following the dramatic events of the previous episodes, a sense of tranquility returns to the Hanaukyo household.

title: I'll Protect Grace
overview: The sentiment is expressed by protagonist Taro, who vows to protect the two personalities, and is also embodied by Grace, who originally came into existence to protect Cynthia.

title: Anticipation for Konoe
overview: Konoe, known for her severe personality, takes it upon herself to help Taro become a more proper and responsible master of the mansion.

title: I'll give you experience
overview: Ikuyo tricking or duping Taro into spending a day disguised as a maid.
